See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 97650 => 'Unitel', 97655 => 'Unitel', 97660 => 'ONDO', 97666 => 'ONDO', 97669 => 'Skytel', 97672 => 'Lime', 97680 => 'Unitel', 97681 => 'ONDO', 97683 => 'G-Mobile', 97685 => 'Mobicom', 97686 => 'Unitel', 97688 => 'Unitel', 97689 => 'Unitel', 97690 => 'Skytel', 97691 => 'Skytel', 97692 => 'Skytel', 97693 => 'G-Mobile', 97694 => 'Mobicom', 97695 => 'Mobicom', 97696 => 'Skytel', 97697 => 'G-Mobile', 97698 => 'G-Mobile', 97699 => 'Mobicom', ];
